title: Discovery Contract v1
description: Small envelope recording which spines, manifests, registries, and capability snapshots an agent has loaded before authoring.

id.description: Stable identifier for this discovery contract instance.

schemaVersion.description: Version tag for this schema (e.g., discovery-contract.v1).

agentProfileId.description: Identifier of the ai-safe-authoring-profile-v1 in effect.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when this discovery contract was generated.

invariantsSpineId.description: Identifier or hash of the invariants spine document.

entertainmentMetricsSpineId.description: Identifier or hash of the entertainment-metrics spine document.

schemaSpineIndexId.description: Identifier or hash of the schema-spine-index document.

manifestRefs.description: List of repository manifest identifiers consulted.

registryRefs.description: List of registry identifiers or slices consulted (regions, events, personas, styles, seeds).

capabilitySpineRef.description: Optional reference to a capability-spine snapshot if present.
